Monitor your resources in a stylish way, it includes CPU/GPU/RAM/STORAGE
Resolution Changer, a fast, always-on-top tool that lets you switch your monitor’s resolution and Hz on the fly with one shortcut.
Launchpad is a lightweight, always-on-top sidebar launcher for Windows that lets you instantly access your favorite apps, folders, and shortcuts right from the edge of your screen.
